patterns.name: Double Bottom
patterns.note: Two near-equal troughs; breaks up above the peak (neckline).

patterns.name: Descending Triangle
patterns.note: Flat support with falling highs; bearish breakdown bias.

earnings_basis_divergence.interpretation: Standalone (unconsolidated) EPS for 2025 is 100% BELOW the consolidated figure — subsidiaries/associates are contributing earnings the parent-only accounts don't show; the group is worth more than the standalone.
